case_title: DAVID MELZER VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MELZER, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
